title: GrindLess
description: GrindLess is a Minecraft datapack designed to enhance your vanilla gameplay by reducing the tedious gathering of some materials.
body:
## _GrindLess_ is designed to **enhance your vanilla gameplay** by reducing the grind of gathering. 

With increased outputs and new crafting recipes, you can focus more on building or exploring. 
Perfect for players who love the game but **want to spend less time on repetitive tasks**.
Download GrindLess and start playing smart today!

_Motivation to build a mushroom farm in your world!_
![So mush room](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0002f216ae6e59633a5a1629eaa6bb972ffc3e65.jpeg)

## Features so far:
- Craftable mushroom blocks, cuttable into mushrom stem in stonecutter 
- Carved pumpkin from pumpkin in stonecutter instead of having to shear each one manually
- Smooth stone and smooth slabs from stone in stonecutter, but kept furnace recipe
- Item frame recipe gives 4 instead of 1
- Wood trapdoors give 12 instead of 2
- Clay and bricks give 2 instead of 1
- Sandstone and red sandstone give 2 instead of 1
- Chains give 3 instead of 1
- All prismarine recipes set give 2 instead of 1
- Dark prismarine and bricks can be crafted from the prismarine block directly

_Smooth stone once again without wasting coal!_
![Smooth stone once again doesn't cost coal!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ab5c0ef6e9392e71023d7a01c2715c251b4727d2.jpeg) 


The idea behind this pack is to make gathering resources for building easier because **most players are not _content creators_ that can afford to spend days grinding**.     
Nonetheless, changes are not drastic or gamebreaking, I inted to keep the vanilla gameplay intact - just **making your effort more rewarding**.  

### Open to suggestions!
### 
_These improved recipes and more!_
![And more!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ca9afbadeea2329fc4d0ad82bc47f34530495310.png)



### Look at my other pack _Better stair recipe_ if you like the changes in this one:
[https://modrinth.com/datapack/better-stair-recipe](https://modrinth.com/datapack/better-stair-recipe)
